meta.title: AI Proposal | D'auchy.Studio
meta.description: AI is a partner that maximizes your knowledge and experience. We support human-centered system development.

hero.title: AI is Your Partner to Maximize Knowledge and Experience
hero.description1: Implementing AI itself is not the goal.
hero.description2: What matters is leveraging the knowledge and experience accumulated in your organization.

paradigmShift.title: Paradigm Shift: AI is Not the Goal
paradigmShift.description1: Implementing AI itself is not the goal.
paradigmShift.description2: What matters is leveraging {strong1}the knowledge and experience accumulated in your organization{strong1End},
paradigmShift.description3: and creating {strong2}systems that align with human sensibilities{strong2End}.
paradigmShift.conclusion: By incorporating both, we aim for a more human-centered system.

uiux.title: Beyond UI/UX Conventions
uiux.description1: Traditional operations like "keyboard input" and "tap or swipe"
uiux.description3: AI enables {strong}intuitive and diverse input methods{strongEnd}.

examples.chat: Chat inquiries: Instant answers with natural language questions
examples.voice: Voice recognition: Automatic meeting minutes from conversations
examples.handwriting: Handwriting capture: Digitize notes and whiteboards by photo
examples.video: Video analysis: Anomaly detection and improvement suggestions from footage
examples.image: Image instructions: Upload photos for necessary actions
examples.iot: IoT integration: Combine sensor data with human perception for analysis

uiux.keyMessage: New interfaces based on "how you feel and ask" rather than "how to operate" are expanding.

rag.title: Leveraging Internal Knowledge with RAG
rag.description1: Rather than directly feeding internal data into AI,
rag.description2: it's important to {strong}search and derive answers from accumulated knowledge and experience{strongEnd}.
rag.description4: You can derive {strong}specific solutions based on your company's unique knowledge{strongEnd} rather than generic information.

examples.dictionary: Terminology dictionary: Accurately understand company-specific terms
examples.knowledge: Knowledge utilization: Reference past cases and know-how in proposals
examples.analytics: Statistical analysis: Quick analysis combining search and AI generation
examples.faq: Automated FAQ responses: Instant answers to common internal questions
examples.regulations: Policy reference: Context-aware explanations for business support
examples.minutes: Meeting minutes search: Apply past discussions to problem-solving

rag.hallucination1: Furthermore, RAG prevents {strong}"hallucination (outputs not based on facts)"{strongEnd}, a challenge with LLMs.
rag.hallucination2: By utilizing verified knowledge sources, you can provide accurate and reliable information.

conclusion.title: Conclusion: AI is a Bridge, Not a Tool
conclusion.description: The real meaning of implementing AI is
conclusion.keyMessage: "to make the most of unique knowledge and experience, and reconstruct human-centered systems"

points.system: Realize new business systems that align with employees and customers
points.partner: AI is a {strong}"partner"{strongEnd} for that purpose
